## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `node --check webgame/app.js`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Manually tested the affected flow in a browser

## Visual Changes

Add screenshots when the interface changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change follows the existing code style.
- [ ] Rulebook behavior remains accurate or the rule change is documented.
- [ ] No unrelated files are included.
